zh.Clutton, Somerset, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特可盧頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Neville於大約1464年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Sir Henry Neville28歲，母親Lady Joan Bourchier25歲。她於1487年與William Brodribb在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可盧頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Neville于大约1464年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Sir Henry Neville28岁，母亲Lady Joan Bourchier25岁。她于1487年与William Brodribb在英国英格兰薩默塞特可盧頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Neville was born about 1464, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Henry Neville, was 28 and her mother, Lady Joan Bourchier, was 25. She married William Brodribb in 1487, in Clutton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Neville est née environ 1464, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry Neville, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Bourchier, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William Brodribb en 1487, à Clutton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Neville um 1464 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Neville 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan Bourchier 25. Sie hat 1487 in Clutton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom William Brodribb geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Neville è nata il circa 1464 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Henry Neville, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan Bourchier, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato William Brodribb nel 1487, nel Clutton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Neville(이)가 대략 1464년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Neville(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Bourchier(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 클루턴에서 William Brodribb(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Neville родилась около 1464 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Neville было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Bourchier, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Brodribb в 1487 г. в местности клуттон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
